title: Containerd Configuration
description: Schema for the containerd daemon configuration file (config.toml), which controls the behavior of the containerd container runtime including plugin settings, runtime options, storage paths, and gRPC server configuration.

version.description: Configuration file format version, currently version 2 is the latest

root.description: Root directory for containerd metadata and state storage

state.description: Directory for containerd runtime state such as sockets and pid files

temp.description: Temporary directory for containerd operations, defaults to system temp if empty

oom_score.description: Out-of-memory score adjustment for the containerd process

imports.description: List of additional configuration file paths or glob patterns to import and merge

disabled_plugins.description: List of plugin IDs to disable at startup

required_plugins.description: List of plugin IDs that must successfully load or containerd will abort

stream_processors.description: Map of media type to stream processor configuration for content handling

timeouts.description: Map of timeout names to duration strings for various containerd operations

proxy_plugins.description: Configuration for external proxy plugins that connect via socket

GRPCConfig.description: Configuration for the containerd gRPC API server socket

address.description: Unix socket path for the gRPC API endpoint

tcp_address.description: Optional TCP address for remote gRPC access in host:port format

tcp_tls_ca.description: Path to the CA certificate for TCP TLS connections

tcp_tls_cert.description: Path to the server certificate for TCP TLS connections

tcp_tls_key.description: Path to the server private key for TCP TLS connections

uid.description: User ID for the Unix socket ownership

gid.description: Group ID for the Unix socket ownership

max_recv_message_size.description: Maximum gRPC receive message size in bytes

max_send_message_size.description: Maximum gRPC send message size in bytes

TTRPCConfig.description: Configuration for the containerd TTRPC (lightweight RPC) server socket

address.description: Unix socket path for the TTRPC endpoint

uid.description: User ID for the Unix socket ownership

gid.description: Group ID for the Unix socket ownership

DebugConfig.description: Configuration for containerd debug and profiling options

address.description: Socket address for the debug API endpoint

uid.description: User ID for the debug socket ownership

gid.description: Group ID for the debug socket ownership

level.description: Logging level for containerd daemon output

MetricsConfig.description: Configuration for containerd Prometheus metrics endpoint

address.description: TCP address in host:port format for the metrics HTTP endpoint

grpc_histogram.description: Enable gRPC connection histogram metrics collection

PluginsConfig.description: Configuration block for containerd plugins, keyed by plugin URI

io.containerd.snapshotter.v1.overlayfs.description: Configuration for the overlayfs snapshotter plugin

root_path.description: Root path for overlayfs snapshotter storage

upperdir_label.description: Enable SELinux labeling on upper directories

additionalProperties.description: Plugin-specific configuration; structure varies by plugin

CRIPluginConfig.description: Configuration for the Container Runtime Interface (CRI) plugin that enables Kubernetes integration

sandbox_image.description: Container image used for the pod sandbox (pause container)

max_container_log_line_size.description: Maximum line size in bytes for container log files, -1 for unlimited

max_concurrent_downloads.description: Maximum number of concurrent image pull operations

tolerate_missing_hugetlb_controller.description: Tolerate a missing hugetlb cgroup controller when creating containers

disable_hugetlb_controller.description: Disable hugetlb cgroup controller regardless of availability

containerd.description: Containerd runtime configuration within the CRI plugin

snapshotter.description: Snapshotter to use for container root filesystems

default_runtime_name.description: Name of the default container runtime to use

max_conf_num.description: Maximum number of CNI configuration files to load

conf_template.description: Path to a CNI configuration template file

registry.description: Container image registry configuration including mirrors and authentication

config_path.description: Path to the directory containing per-host registry configuration

mirrors.description: Registry mirror configuration mapped by registry host

endpoint.description: List of mirror endpoint URLs for this registry

insecure_skip_verify.description: Skip TLS certificate verification for this registry

ca_file.description: Path to the CA certificate for this registry

cert_file.description: Path to the client certificate for this registry

key_file.description: Path to the client key for this registry

RuntimeConfig.description: Configuration for a named container runtime

runtime_type.description: Type identifier for the runtime shim

runtime_path.description: Absolute path to the runtime binary, overrides runtime_type lookup

privileged_without_host_devices.description: Run privileged containers without host device access

options.description: Runtime-specific options such as runc binary path and systemd cgroup usage

BinaryName.description: Path to the OCI runtime binary

SystemdCgroup.description: Use systemd cgroup driver instead of cgroupfs

StreamProcessor.description: Configuration for a content stream processor that handles specific media types

accepts.description: List of media types this processor accepts as input

path.description: Path to the stream processor binary

args.description: Arguments to pass to the stream processor binary

env.description: Environment variables for the stream processor in KEY=VALUE format

ProxyPlugin.description: Configuration for an external proxy plugin that connects via a Unix socket

type.description: Plugin type such as snapshot, content, or diff

address.description: Unix socket address for the proxy plugin
